source: IMF IMTS (International Trade in Goods, by partner country) — api.imf.org SDMX 2.1, flow IMF.STA:IMTS(1.0.0), key COUNTRY.INDICATOR.COUNTERPART_COUNTRY.A, indicators XG_FOB_USD (goods exports FOB, USD) + MG_CIF_USD (goods imports CIF, USD), euro area = G163 aggregate
method: annual bilateral X+M shares, row-normalized over the other blocs, zero diagonal, per year; partners with raw share <0.05% dropped then renormalized (same rule as the static weights_full.json); 6-dp rounding with largest-partner residual adjustment; RU/TW partner-side mirror fallback; reporter-years with no data are omitted (listed in omitted_rows), never imputed
